_comment.1: DEEP GAIN (K) sweep of the x/tilt axis, 5-30 Hz only. Same plant
_comment.2: path and operating point as conf_bode_x.json (32x32 exp125 gain100
_comment.3: bw100, beam-centred ROI, coarse bias 2/2, software injection replacing
_comment.4: the x element, piplate on ch1). The ONLY differences are in bode_plot:
_comment.5: the sweep ends at 30 Hz (the k_max_freq band) and each point is
_comment.6: averaged ~2.5x deeper (100 cycles / 10 segments vs 49/7) over ~2.5x
_comment.7: as many in-band points, so the error-weighted K over <=30 Hz is much
_comment.8: tighter. Purpose: pin the gain. NOT for delay -- a 5-30 Hz phase slope
_comment.9: is delay-limited and tau from this run is unreliable; keep the full
_comment.11: Runtime: ~2 passes x ~190 s (amplitude + linearity) + 30 s hold ~= 7 min.
_comment.12: CAVEAT: deeper averaging shrinks the WITHIN-run K error bar and smooths
_comment.13: the curve, but run-to-run K swing is mostly physical (line wander / beam
_comment.14: drift). To tighten THAT, average several runs, not one deeper run.

params._roi_note: ROI centred on beam at coarse bias 2/2 (fine 1.5/2.15): probe-verified 2026-07-21, full-sensor CoM (x 919, y 507). Re-derive via contrib/probe_frame.json only on an alignment change.

pipeline._comment: frame -> UDP viewer, so you can watch the beam + tracking (same as steering_fsp)

params._note: tracked 20x20 window, threshold 22 -- matches conf_bode_x.json so the sweep measures the same sensor the loop sees.

pipeline._comment: CoM -> UDP viewer so the tracked centroid can be overlaid on the frame
Replace the x/tilt element (1) with the swept sine; read CoM x as response

params._tuning: DEEP K: 20 log points from 5 to 30 Hz, 100 cycles/point split into 10 integer-cycle segments (10 cyc/seg). vs the full sweep's 49/7. Every point is inside the k_max_freq band so K is the error-weighted mean over all 20 deep points. 100 cycles at 5 Hz = 20 s and gives ~0.05 Hz lock-in RBW, cleanly resolving the 5.64/9.59 Hz lines.
params._amplitude2: half-amplitude linearity check: if |H| moves between amplitudes the CoM has left its linear region and K is not trustworthy. Kept here because an accurate K is worthless if it is measured in a nonlinear regime.
params._avoid_freqs: only the measured bench lines at/below 30 Hz matter for this band; a line inside the lock-in skirt biases the point coherently (deeper averaging does NOT remove it -- only dodging the line does).
params.config: x/tilt DEEP GAIN 5-30 Hz, coarse bias 2.0/2.0, 32x32 exp125 gain100 bw100, beam-centred ROI, tracked 20x20 thr22. K only (tau unreliable over this short band -- use conf_bode_x.json for delay).

pipeline._note: same mapping as conf_bode_x.json: ch0=y(parked), ch1=x(driven), ch2/ch3 coarse parked. Coarse offsets 2.0/2.0 = current operating point.
